title: Mr. 3 Loses Control
description: On pages 12–15, mr. 3 loses control as usopp, Karoo, and Luffy counterattack against Mr. 5, Miss Valentine, and Mr. 3 as the wax trap begins to fall apart.
scene: Mr. 3 Loses Control. Usopp, Karoo, and Luffy counterattack against Mr. 5, Miss Valentine, and Mr. 3 as the wax trap begins to fall apart. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: You must be using Subpar gunpowder...

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: Damn, this is pretty bad... we're hardening up really fast...!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Glad I decided on my pose already.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I just have to destroy that pumpkin, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I believe that's what I should be saying, is it not...?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: You should stop interfering in my efforts to create art!

summary: This part centers on mr. 3 loses control, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
